title: Review
description: A junior analyst's submission for a case

action.description: The action the analyst chose from the action bar

time_spent_seconds.description: Elapsed seconds from case load to submission

examples.reasoning: The AI has applied a quarterly run-rate to what appears to be a one-time event. The FinanceConnect 2024 sponsorship of $240K is categorised under Conference — typically annual. Before approving I would request the vendor invoice and prior-year GL entries to confirm this is non-recurring. Projecting $1.45M full-year marketing from Q1 inflated by a one-time item would materially overstate the budget.
